steps.title: Emphasize harsh conditions
steps.content: The student's goal is to emphasize how harsh tundra conditions can be. The notes provide the strongest detail for that purpose: winter temperatures average a frigid −30 degrees Fahrenheit. That temperature directly supports the idea of severe winter conditions, unlike details about survival or plant growth.

steps.title: Reject survival-focused choices
steps.content: B focuses on animal adaptation rather than the conditions themselves. C emphasizes plant diversity and mild growing-season temperatures. D emphasizes that plants and animals can live there, not the harshness of the environment. The answer is A.
